{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Eithan's robes
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] wears turquoise-and-gold robes.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c15">''Blackflame'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] wears fine white-and-gold robes.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
